source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/ADD/접수자료/EMC 접수자료 231219/5. Test plan/ADD(1G) Detector Test plan 231220.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: EMC test plan content for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector models HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines minimum test plan contents, configurations, pass/fail criteria, sample information, power inputs, accessories, and EMC-related test setup references for the detector.
keyPoints: Product identified as Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector, Model ADD(HAD1417MCW, HAD1717MCW).
Test facility is Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
Intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children, excluding mammography and direct cardiac application.
EMISSIONS compliance class and group are listed as Group 1 Class A.
One sample of each model is to be tested.

entities.name: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.

concepts.name: Basic safety and essential performance
concepts.evidence: Description of the BASIC SAFETY and ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE including a description how the BASIC SAFETY and ESSENTIAL PERFORMANCE will be monitored against the pass/fail criteria during each test

concepts.evidence: IMMUNITY pass/fail criteria ... Operation normally when operation is required ... Image pixel size is obtained as intended.

concepts.evidence: Data is transmitted and received between the Detector and the PC in accordance with the Ethernet standard.

concepts.evidence: Planned ESD test points. ... Offer the photo showing the test points and will be recorded to test report.

evidence.claim: The document is a test plan using recommended minimum test plan contents.
evidence.evidenceText: Table G.1 – Recommended minimum test plan contents

evidence.claim: The test facility is Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. 155 & 159, Osan-Ro, Mohyeon-Myeon, Cheoin-Gu, Yongin-Si, Gyeonggi-Do 16885 KOREA, REPUBLIC OF

evidence.claim: The ME equipment is a Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector with models HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name : Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector Model : ADD(HAD1417MCW, HAD1717MCW)
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X Ray Detector

evidence.claim: The detector converts absorbed X-rays to digital data and delivers it to a PC via access point or main cable.
evidence.evidenceText: The detector converts absorbed x-ray to digital data, deliver it to PC via AP (Access Point) or main cable and PC converts the delivered digital data into images to show it on the monitor.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X Ray Detector Operation

evidence.claim: The intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X Ray Detector Intended Use

evidence.claim: The detector is not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X Ray Detector Intended Use

evidence.claim: Software for detector testing includes ADAcqu Manager 1.0.1 and EzView 1.0.0.0, with firmware version 1.0.
evidence.evidenceText: Software version : Software for detector testing. 1) ADAcqu Manager: 1.0.1 2) EzView: 1.0.0.0 Firmware Version: 1.0

evidence.claim: One sample of each model, HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW, is to be tested.
evidence.evidenceText: Number of samples to be tested : 1 EA of each model (HAD1417MCW, HAD1717MCW)

evidence.claim: EMISSIONS compliance class and group are Group 1 Class A.
evidence.evidenceText: IMMUNITY TEST LEVELS for each IMMUNITY test and EMISSIONS compliance class and group ... Group 1 Class A

evidence.claim: Immunity pass/fail criteria include normal operation when required, consistent power supply connection during EMC testing, normal operation of manufacturer-provided software, and intended image pixel size.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation normally when operation is required Connected consistently to POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed. When connected to POWER SUPPLY, program provided by manufacturer is operated normally. Image pixel size is obtained as intended.

evidence.claim: The ME equipment is to be tested as table-top equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: ME EQUIPMENT will be tested as table-top.
evidence.pageTarget: Table Top Medical Electrical Equipment EMC Testing

evidence.claim: The detector and PC transmit and receive data in accordance with the Ethernet standard.
evidence.evidenceText: Data is transmitted and received between the Detector and the PC in accordance with the Ethernet standard.

evidence.claim: Power solution 1 input is 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A and output is DC 16 V, 3 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Power solution #1 : INPUT : 100 - 240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A OUTPUT : DC. 16 V, 3 A

evidence.claim: Power solution 2 input is 100-240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A and output is DC 15 V, 6 A.
evidence.evidenceText: Power solution #2 : INPUT : 100 - 240 V~, 50/60 Hz, 1.0 A OUTPUT : DC. 15 V, 6 A

evidence.claim: The power supply box earth GND terminal is to be connected securely to facility ground with a cable.
evidence.evidenceText: Connect the Earth GND terminal of the Power Supply Box to the facility ground securely with a cable
